Perplexity Review (2026): Pricing, Features & Alternatives

An AI-powered answer engine that cites sources for every response.

MakerPerplexity AI
CategoryAI Research & Search, AI Chatbots & Assistants
PricingFree plan available; Pro $20/mo
Free tierYes
WebsiteVisit Perplexity →

Best for

Fast, cited research and fact-checking instead of manual Googling.

Pros

  • Always shows sources/citations for claims
  • Great for up-to-date research and fact-checking
  • Focus mode for academic, Reddit, or news-only search

Cons

  • Less suited for creative writing than dedicated writing tools
  • Pro features needed for best models

Alternatives to Perplexity

ChatGPT

The most widely used AI chatbot for writing, research, coding help, and everyday questions.

Gemini

Google's AI assistant, deeply integrated with Search, Gmail, Docs, and Android.

Claude

An AI assistant known for careful reasoning, long context windows, and strong coding ability.
